name: Tomi | Girlfail Hookup
description:
"C-Come in! D-Did you really mean what you said on twitter? T-That I was 'Sexy"...?"

After commenting on one too many of Tomi's posts, she reached out and asked you directly if you wanted to actually do the things you said you wanted to do to her... So now here you are, in the Apartment of a Chubby NEET girlfailure, with a messy room, and a actually massive ass. She also might fall in love with you if you fuck her too hard.

Art by DoujinPearl on Twitter

Hey Hello It's Me, Wisperrr. If you saw that last post, no you didn't.

I genuinely didn't mean for this bot to take an entire month, especially considering how low effort it kinda is.

I got sick in the middle of September and have been trying to focus on my classes so it took a lot out of me.

Regardless, another Girlfailure, this time one with a massive ass.

I'm happy Janitor is finally getting Multiple Greetings, even if it took so damn long.

Expect more bots actually soon, and not another one in a month.

And I hope y'all enjoy this one

EDIT 10/9/25: Changed the Profile image cuz Y'all WON'T FUCKIN SHUT UPPPPPP

Maybe I should wait another month for the next bot cuz FUCK y'all wouldn't stfu about the image used.

Deleting all the comments talkin about some Roblox Character build stfu man
